scope: package-wide implementation planning and task-intake register after the post-hardening readiness v0.7 checkpoint

currentPackagePosture.note: Keep Phase 0 active by default. Do not activate Phase 1+ package-internal semantic closure unless an immediate implementation, prototype, pilot, or concrete contradiction trigger exists.

phaseModel.title: Cross-cutting integrity patch wave
phaseModel.activationRule: Activate only when an immediate implementation/prototype/pilot is blocked by a cross-cutting semantic or runtime gap.

phaseModel.title: Hostile regression wave
phaseModel.activationRule: Activate only when an implementation path needs end-to-end break tests or hostile regression proof.

phaseModel.title: Pilot-triggered semantic micro-closures
phaseModel.activationRule: Activate only when real pilot scope proves a specific missing semantic carrier is needed.

phaseModel.title: Structural artifact-family cleanup
phaseModel.activationRule: Activate only when more than one implementation or external-profile lane needs clearer standardized-surface and status/module boundaries.

phaseModel.title: Live evidence and accountable review
phaseModel.activationRule: Activate only when real pilot/runtime evidence arrives.

tasks.title: Establish package-wide implementation planning and task register scaffold
tasks.triggerToActivate: Started immediately to create a durable package-wide task home.
tasks.summary: Create one package-visible planning and task-intake surface so implementation work can be logged without silently reopening active law.
tasks.nextAction: Use this scaffold for all new package-wide implementation tasks.

tasks.title: Temporal qualifier micro-closure
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activate when an immediate implementation/prototype/pilot needs bounded or record-only chronology, or a real contradiction appears between active event contracts and evidence handling.
tasks.summary: Add a reusable exact/bounded/record-only time qualifier and retrofit the narrow active contracts that currently force exact timestamps.
tasks.nextAction: Keep gated until implementation trigger exists; prepare smallest-patch note only when needed.

tasks.title: Governed authority and role code closure
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activate when implementation begins authorization work or conformance evidence shows free-string drift risk is no longer theoretical.
tasks.summary: Bind authority action classes and role types to governed catalogs instead of loose strings where the package already treats them as governed law.
tasks.nextAction: Keep gated until an actual authorization implementation lane begins.

tasks.title: Currentness and standardized-surface boundary honesty cleanup
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activate when integrator or automation work needs machine-readable currentness and placeholder status beyond current README/currentness notes.
tasks.summary: Make the current/draft/placeholder boundary easier for tools and implementers to read without overstating the machine-closed standardized surface.
tasks.nextAction: Keep gated until an implementation or automation consumer needs stronger currentness/status signaling.

tasks.title: Offline contractor late-sync hostile regression
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activate when a real implementation path includes delayed sync, offline work, or promotion-time reauthorization.
tasks.summary: Run an end-to-end regression where record time is known first, bounded event time arrives later, and promotion rechecks revocation without rewriting original capture.
tasks.nextAction: Keep gated until delayed-sync behavior is on the implementation path.

tasks.title: Boundary correction after frozen submission hostile regression
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activate when an implementation path includes identity/lifecycle invalidation or correction of already-frozen outputs.
tasks.summary: Run a regression where a field boundary correction invalidates current-state materialization while preserving the original filing basis and generating a traceable successor assembly.
tasks.nextAction: Keep gated until correction-heavy implementation behavior is in scope.

tasks.title: Quantity-bearing intervention carrier
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activate only if the first implementation or pilot scope needs interoperable quantity/dose/rate/concentration semantics for planned or executed interventions.
tasks.summary: Closed/superseded by IMP-305 through the Phase AGR-P3 InterventionIntentPayload and ExecutionRecordPayload carrier-shell closure.
tasks.nextAction: Use the Phase AGR-P3 carriers in partial extent, code-binding, and reconstruction fixtures rather than reopening a generic operation object.
tasks.completionNote: IMP-305 refines and activates the original quantity-bearing intervention carrier into separate intent and execution payload families.

tasks.title: Geometry-basis descriptor
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activate only if the first implementation or pilot scope includes contested geometry corrections, multi-system sync, or geometry-sensitive filing disputes.
tasks.summary: Closed/superseded by IMP-306 through the Phase AGR-P4 PartialExtent and geometry-basis carrier-shell closure.
tasks.nextAction: Use PartialExtent in query/output and code-binding fixtures rather than reopening a generic GIS topology object.
tasks.completionNote: IMP-306 refines and activates the original geometry-basis descriptor into a minimal PartialExtent carrier.

tasks.title: Structural artifact-family and status cleanup
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activate only when multiple implementations or external-profile lanes need stronger machine-readable status/module boundaries than the current package provides.
tasks.summary: Clean up the relationship between claimed standardized families, current machine-closed families, and currentness/status signaling.
tasks.nextAction: Keep gated until real implementation pressure justifies structural cleanup.

tasks.title: Live evidence and accountable review on first real packet
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activate when the first real pilot/runtime evidence packet arrives.
tasks.summary: Use the existing intake and reviewer-side decision lanes to process the first real external evidence packet with accountable disposition.
tasks.nextAction: Wait for real evidence; do not simulate activation with package-authored rehearsal artifacts.

tasks.title: Durable relationship semantics closure wave
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activated by explicit maintainer decision to execute the typed-family durable relationship patch wave.
tasks.summary: Promote the small typed durable-relationship family into the accepted RFC and active machine-contract set without changing the core authority model.
tasks.nextAction: Use the new relationship families in hostile fixture and conformance lanes rather than widening the core authority objects.

tasks.title: Exchange-boundary starter contracts wave
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activated by explicit maintainer decision to execute the smallest sister-platform contract/access boundary patch.
tasks.summary: Promote the starter contract and grant-receipt boundary artifacts needed now for contract-linked access and cross-platform grant traceability.
tasks.nextAction: Keep delivery/dispute profiling narrow and profile-first unless later fixtures prove a standalone schema is required.

tasks.title: Advisory signal boundary candidate lane
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activate when an external advisory or monitoring integration needs an explicit machine-visible signal carrier.
tasks.summary: Carry the reusable AdvisorySignal boundary seam in implementation/conformance without promoting social or community semantics into active law.
tasks.nextAction: Remain queued and trigger-based; reopen only if at least two real advisory/monitoring integrations converge on the same minimal signal fields or live implementation proves the current bridge/review law insufficient. See `04_implementation_and_conformance/conformance_runners/authority_and_governance_conformance/OFARM_Multiparty_Relationship_and_Boundary_Closure_Memo_v0_1.md`.

tasks.title: Delivery evidence and dispute boundary profiling
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activate when contract-linked buyer access and delayed-sync dispute fixtures prove a stable profile boundary is required.
tasks.summary: Decide whether delivery evidence should remain a typed/profiled evidence lane and how dispute open/update/close should profile governance behavior without creating a new top-level family.
tasks.nextAction: Profile-first remains sufficient; reopen only if later fixtures prove real schema insufficiency.

tasks.title: Multiparty hostile regression and delayed-sync fixtures
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activate once the first relationship and starter exchange-boundary contracts stop moving.
tasks.summary: Prove owner/tenant/operator conflict, advisor-of-record delegated entry, contract-linked buyer access, and delayed-sync dispute behavior against the new active relationship and boundary families.
tasks.nextAction: First-wave hostile regression is complete; second-priority labour/cooperative/pool/emergency coverage has been split into IMP-204.

tasks.title: Second multiparty hostile regression wave
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activate after the first hostile relationship/boundary wave passes and second-priority labour/cooperative/pool/emergency seams remain the highest-value unexecuted fixture set.
tasks.summary: Prove seasonal worker supervision, cooperative aggregation/branding, shared machinery pooled responsibility, and neighbour-help emergency handling against the active relationship and starter exchange-boundary families.
tasks.nextAction: This line is provisionally closed; only the advisory/community signal boundary lane remains queued and trigger-based. See `04_implementation_and_conformance/conformance_runners/authority_and_governance_conformance/OFARM_Multiparty_Relationship_and_Boundary_Closure_Memo_v0_1.md`.

tasks.title: Provisionally close multiparty relationship and starter boundary patch line
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activated after the durable relationship and starter exchange-boundary waves plus both hostile multiparty fixture waves passed.
tasks.summary: Record the package stop-point for the multiparty relationship and starter boundary seam, leaving only the advisory signal lane queued and trigger-based.
tasks.nextAction: No further package-internal work by default. Reopen only on the triggers listed in the closure memo.

tasks.title: Read-only analysis sandbox boundary clarification wave
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activated by explicit maintainer request to clarify whether OFARM should support a Code-Interpreter-style analysis sandbox without reopening baseline law.
tasks.summary: Define the smallest allowed boundary for sandboxed code execution over governed OFARM reads so exploratory computation is possible without direct truth mutation, hidden stores, or ad hoc backend access.
tasks.nextAction: Use this boundary note when a deployment wants bounded sandbox execution; promote any external runtime surface or machine-visible contract only if a real implementation later needs stable discovery or conformance fixtures.

tasks.title: Agronomic observation and measurement context carrier
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activate when agronomic scenario fixtures or a real pilot require structured crop-stage, method, sampling, unit, threshold, calibration, or uncertainty context for high-consequence observations.
tasks.summary: Closed at carrier-shell level by AgronomicObservationContext and MeasurementEvidence RFC, schemas, examples, and Phase 2 runner.
tasks.nextAction: Use these carriers in IMP-305 intervention/as-applied, IMP-306 extent, IMP-307 code-binding, and IMP-309 reconstruction work.
tasks.completionNote: Phase AGR-P2 adds active observation and measurement carriers without changing baseline law text. EvidenceSufficiencyCase v0.2 is reused through bridge examples.

tasks.title: Agronomic scenario fixture library
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activated by Senior Agronomist Reviewer findings showing scenario depth, not broad architecture, is the immediate quality limiter.
tasks.summary: Closed by expectation-level AGR-P1 scenario records plus AGR-P8 package-local runtime-chain fixtures covering all AGR-SCEN identifiers.
tasks.nextAction: Reopen only if a pilot or implementation exposes a scenario that cannot be expressed by the active agronomic carriers and runtime-chain fixture pattern.
tasks.completionNote: AGR-P8 closes the scenario fixture library from expectation-level pressure to package-local runtime-chain conformance evidence.
tasks.closureNote: AGR-P8 runtime-chain closure provides package-local executable chain evidence for AGR-P1 scenarios.

tasks.title: Agronomic quantity-bearing intervention closure
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activate next when crop-protection, fertilization, seeding, irrigation, drying, or other input-bearing pilot work needs product/rate/dose/as-applied semantics; Phase AGR-P2 carriers are now available for observation/evidence basis.
tasks.summary: Closed at carrier-shell level by the Quantity-Bearing Intervention and As-Applied RFC, InterventionIntentPayload, ExecutionRecordPayload, bridge examples, and Phase AGR-P3 runner.
tasks.nextAction: Feed partial extent, code-binding, and query/output reconstruction work; do not flatten the new carriers into one application CRUD object.
tasks.completionNote: Phase AGR-P3 adds active payload carriers for recommendation/prescription/plan and operation claim/as-applied/accepted/correction/dispute separation.

tasks.title: Partial extent and geometry-basis closure
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activate when partial treatment, replant, geometry correction, or filing/output disputes require explicit extent basis.
tasks.summary: Closed at carrier-shell level by the Partial Extent and Geometry Basis RFC, PartialExtent schema, bridge examples, and Phase AGR-P4 runner.
tasks.nextAction: Use PartialExtent in code-binding, query/output reconstruction, and scenario fixtures; do not create durable identities unless identity/lifecycle law requires it.
tasks.completionNote: Phase AGR-P4 closed the partial extent / geometry-basis seam without modifying active baseline law.

tasks.title: Agronomic code-binding and standards profile
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activate after Deep Research or pilot constraints define required crop, variety, pest, weed, disease, input, unit, method, and threshold code systems.
tasks.summary: Closed at carrier/profile level by the Agronomic Code Binding and Standards Profile RFC, AgronomicIdentityBinding, AgronomicCodeBindingProfile, examples, and Phase AGR-P5 runner.
tasks.nextAction: Use AgronomicIdentityBinding and AgronomicCodeBindingProfile in query/output reconstruction, PassportView disclosure fixtures, and later baseline harmonisation.
tasks.notes: Closed at carrier-shell/profile level by Phase AGR-P5. Live registry verification and wire-level exchange mappings remain outside this phase.
tasks.completionNote: Phase AGR-P5 closes code-binding/profile carrier semantics without editing active baseline law or importing external standards as OFARM law.

tasks.title: Farm scenario coverage matrix
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activated to make agronomic coverage visible without promoting research findings into baseline law.
tasks.summary: Maintain the farm scenario coverage matrix; AGR-P8 has upgraded core AGR-SCEN coverage to package-local chain evidence.
tasks.nextAction: Keep active as a maintenance matrix for future pilot, crop-profile, live-registry, and wire-level exchange additions.

tasks.title: Agronomic query and output reconstruction fixtures
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activate next after Phase AGR-P5 now that observation, measurement, intervention, execution, partial extent, and code-binding/profile carriers are available.
tasks.summary: Closed at query/output reconstruction level by the Agronomic Query and Output Reconstruction RFC, reconstruction policy/trace schemas, agronomic query/output examples, and AGR-P6 runner.
tasks.nextAction: Use the reconstruction fixtures as evidence for later baseline harmonisation; do not turn query aliases, PassportViews, DocumentAssemblies, or current-state materializations into truth stores.
tasks.completionNote: Phase AGR-P6 closes query/output reconstruction without editing active baseline law or introducing a public query syntax.

tasks.title: Agronomic local-knowledge rationale lineage fixtures
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activate when advisory rationale lineage becomes part of pilot or AI-agent UX scope.
tasks.summary: Closed at package-local conformance level by AGR-P9 local-knowledge rationale lineage fixtures linking narrative observation, local memory rule, advisory recommendation, planned intervention, operation claim, and accepted consequence while preserving Advisory/Compliance separation.
tasks.nextAction: Keep local-knowledge rationale lineage as explainability and advisory/reconstruction support; add crop- or UX-specific variants only when a pilot profile requires them.
tasks.completionNote: AGR-P9 closes local-knowledge rationale lineage without adding baseline law, accepted RFCs, or machine-contract schemas.

tasks.title: Crop-only scope and livestock non-goal harmonisation
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activate only during baseline harmonisation after agronomic scenario and carrier closure, or if livestock scope ambiguity blocks implementation.
tasks.summary: Closed by AGR-P7 baseline harmonisation: the crop-farming release boundary and livestock non-goal are explicit in active baseline law.
tasks.nextAction: Reopen only if livestock becomes an explicit accepted future profile/sister-model scope.
tasks.completionNote: AGR-P7 makes the current release crop-only and blocks silent livestock reuse of crop abstractions.

tasks.title: Agronomic carrier baseline harmonisation closure
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activated after AGR-P2 through AGR-P6 accepted RFCs, machine contracts, examples, fixtures, and runners stabilized.
tasks.summary: Reflect agronomic observation/measurement, intervention/as-applied, partial extent, code-binding/profile, and query/output reconstruction carrier closures in active baseline law without introducing new carrier design.
tasks.nextAction: Move to pilot-depth conformance, jurisdiction/crop profile packs, live registry verification, and wire-level exchange mapping only when real implementation evidence arrives.
tasks.completionNote: AGR-P7 baseline harmonisation completed; no new truth model, external-standard import, or promotion shortcut introduced.

tasks.title: Agronomic runtime-chain fixture closure
tasks.triggerToActivate: Activated after AGR-P7 baseline harmonisation left the AGR-P1 scenario suite as expectation-level PASS_WITH_LIMITATIONS.
tasks.summary: Add package-local runtime-chain fixtures assembling observation, measurement, intervention, execution, partial extent, code binding, evidence sufficiency, accepted consequence, materialization, query, PassportView, and DocumentAssembly behavior across all AGR-SCEN identifiers.
tasks.nextAction: Move to live-pilot evidence, jurisdiction/crop profiles, live registry checks, or wire-level exchange mappings only when real implementation evidence arrives.
tasks.completionNote: Closed at package-local conformance-chain level; no baseline, RFC, or machine-contract schema additions were required.
tasks.closureNote: Package-local conformance chain closure validated. Does not claim production runtime or live exchange conformance.

tasks.title: FMIS interoperability investigation report intake
tasks.phase: Phase 5 — live evidence and accountable review
tasks.summary: Ingest Codex FMIS investigation report and classify BigQuery KIS marts as discovery surfaces rather than OFARM truth.
exitCriteria: report copied into active supporting implementation lane
no baseline law or active machine-contract schema changed

tasks.title: KIS redacted adapter spike candidate fixture
tasks.phase: Phase 5 — live evidence and accountable review
tasks.summary: Create deterministic fixture mapping the redacted KIS operation packet into candidate OFARM carriers while blocking promotion.

tasks.title: P0 FMIS evidence request bundle
tasks.phase: Phase 5 — live evidence and accountable review
tasks.summary: Collect the P0 evidence bundle required before any compliance-grade FMIS mapping or promotion spike.
exitCriteria: complete redacted crop-protection operation packet supplied

tasks.title: Source-side correction and dispute reconstruction probe
tasks.phase: Phase 5 — live evidence and accountable review
tasks.summary: Probe audit/revision/update streams for deleted, corrected, superseded, aborted, disputed, and late-synced operations.
exitCriteria: old and new assertions are preserved

tasks.title: Original machine/controller payload ingestion probe
tasks.phase: Phase 5 — live evidence and accountable review
tasks.summary: Compare BigQuery actual-operation rows against original ISOXML/ADAPT/EFDI/controller payloads or API responses.
exitCriteria: machine log remains evidence not truth

tasks.title: Crop-protection product regulatory binding enrichment
tasks.phase: Phase 5 — live evidence and accountable review
tasks.summary: Bind local material records for the sample operation to jurisdiction-scoped product authorization, active substances, labels, and unit/quantity semantics.
exitCriteria: local material identity mapped or explicitly unresolved

tasks.title: First read-only KIS adapter prototype
tasks.phase: Phase 5 — live evidence and accountable review
tasks.summary: Build a thin read-only adapter that emits OFARM candidate carriers, source-health reports, loss maps, and promotion blockers from approved KIS packets.

tasks.title: Logineko entity package addendum intake
tasks.phase: Phase 5 — live evidence and accountable review
tasks.summary: Ingest the Logineko entity package addendum as a source-map aid and checkpoint-evidence strengthening input for the KIS adapter candidate.
exitCriteria: entity package classified as source-map aid only

tasks.title: Entity-guided scouting and material-session probe expansion
tasks.phase: Phase 5 — live evidence and accountable review
tasks.summary: Use the Logineko entity model map to recover source-side scouting relationships and material-session custody rows for a more complete operation packet.
blockedBy: access to entity-level source fields not exposed in current BigQuery projection
operation candidate with linked scouting rows
exitCriteria: scouting-to-planned-operation link recovered or explicitly ruled out
material-session evidence captured or explicitly absent for the candidate

tasks.title: Consolidate May 14 multi-team addendums
tasks.summary: Merged safe active-supporting additions and moved incompatible/proposed addendums into review holding with explicit ledgers.

tasks.title: Review regulatory inspector RC2.1a held candidates
tasks.summary: Decide whether any regulatory inspector active-folder candidates should be selectively promoted.
blockedBy: conflict review against active RC2.1 and AGR baseline

tasks.title: Rebase or supply CSF-P0 through P12 predecessor chain
tasks.summary: P11/P12 patches cannot be active-merged until predecessor packages or a rebased patch are available.
blockedBy: missing CSF-P0 through P10/P11 amended base chain

tasks.title: AI assistant computation promotion evidence review
tasks.summary: Review v0.8 finalisation package after real platform/runtime isolation and source-readiness evidence exists.

tasks.title: Predevelopment AI-agent draft-artifact promotion review
tasks.summary: Determine which draft support artifacts from the AI-agent-readiness amendment should become companion/RFC/machine-contract artifacts.

tasks.title: Farm-owner source-owner/live evidence closure
tasks.summary: Move farm-owner addendum beyond pilot/shadow-import readiness only after owner/source-owner or live OFARM-compatible runtime evidence exists.

lastAmendmentNote: Added consolidation task entries IMP-390 through IMP-395; incompatible P11/P12 task-register states remain in review holding until predecessor chain is reconciled.
